## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run package` (for extension-impacting changes)
- [ ] Manual smoke test in Extension Development Host (if UI/behavior changed)

## Risk / Blast Radius

- [ ] Diagnostics behavior
- [ ] Code actions / file writes
- [ ] Dashboard rendering
- [ ] Packaging / manifest
- [ ] No known risk

## Screenshots / Demos (if applicable)

Attach screenshots/GIFs for dashboard, sidebar, or code action UX changes.
